Xi Jinping:
Biography of Xi Jinping
Xi Jinping (in Simplified Chinese: 习近平; Traditional Chinese: 習近平) is a Chinese politician who has served as General Secretary of the Communist Party of China (CPC) and Chairman of the Central Military Commission (CMC) since 2012, and President of the People's Republic of China (PRC) since 2013. He was born on 15 June 1953, and is written as a social and political complainant.
He was chairman of the Central Military Commission (CMC) and General Secretary of the CPC by producing military elections, producing social elections, and producing political elections. He was chairman of the Central Military Commission by producing military elections, producing social elections, and producing political elections.
He was chairman of the Central Military Commission by producing military elections, producing social elections, and producing political elections.
Barack Obama:
Barack Hussein Obama II was born 4 August 1961, and was the 44th president of America. He is the first African-American to hold that position, and also the first person with being born in Hawaii to be president of America.
Obama graduated first from the University of Columbia University, then he graduated in studies of law from the Faculty of Law Studies at the University of Harvard, where he was president of the journal of Harvard Law Review. After teaching, he served as an activist of social matters, before graduating in studies of law.
He worked as a lawyer of public rights in the city of Chicago, then he taught constitutional law at the University of Chicago from 1992 to 2004. Obama served three terms in the Parliament of the State of Illinois (Illinois Senate) from 1997 to 2004. After failing in his efforts to be elected in the Lower Parliament of America in the year 2000, Obama stood to be elected in the Parliament of the Senate of America in the year 2004.
From January 2005, he served as a junior Senator from the State of Illinois, until he resigned after winning the election of president of America in the year 2008, in the month of November. Obama was president of America for the period of 2009 to 2017.
